description_long: This bungalow complex features a modern, rectangular layout with multiple attached units arranged around a central open courtyard. The exterior walls are clad in a mix of stone and white paneling, with flat roofs and minimal overhangs. Each unit has its own entrance, small private yard, and rooftop terrace, while the central area is paved and landscaped with patches of grass and decorative stepping stones. The rear section includes a communal area with a hot tub, palm tree, and additional greenery, enhancing the sense of shared outdoor space. Large sliding glass doors and windows provide natural light and visual connection between indoor and outdoor areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, privacy, and communal living within a compact footprint.
description: A modern, multi-unit bungalow complex with stone and white panel exteriors, flat roofs, and a central landscaped courtyard. Features private entrances, rooftop terraces, and a communal rear area with a hot tub and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, central paved courtyard, and individual unit facades with stone and white paneling.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roofs, private yards, and the communal rear area with a hot tub and palm tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the communal area with hot tub, greenery, and the back facades of the units.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of unit entrances, rooftop terraces, and landscaped private yards.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
